headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, Promotional Banners, Large Scores

body.usage: Paragraphs, Usernames, Match Stats, Button Text

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. gap-6 or gap-8 between grid items.
layouts.grid: Bento Grid style for dashboards. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Mobile-first stacking.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment for stats and scores. Center-aligned hero.

glassmorphism.card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg
glassmorphism.header: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
glassmorphism.share_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-gold/30 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,215,0,0.15)]

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#FFD700] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-8 rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,215,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors border border-white/10

components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border border-white/20 bg-white/5 text-white

motion.page_load: staggered fade-up animations for lists and grids

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep navy/black backgrounds. Gold text should be bold for readability.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

hero_background.description: Dark football stadium with bright floodlights, perfect for overlay.

share_card_bg.description: Close up of a soccer ball on dark grass under stadium lights.

premium_pass_bg.description: Abstract dark metallic texture with gold highlights.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Bebas Neue and Manrope from Google Fonts via next/font or standard HTML link.
Install framer-motion for smooth list staggering and share card trophy pop-ins.
Modify tailwind.config.js to include specific colors: base navy (#0A0B10), gold accents (#FFD700).
Build a mobile-first dashboard where cards have heavy padding (p-6) and distinct glass borders.

For the 'Share Card' component, use relative positioning with an absolute background image (share_card_bg) with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/60), glassmorphism content, and gold typography to make it highly viral.
Ensure 'data-testid' is on all prediction buttons, auth forms, and navigation links.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for the main feed; build custom glassmorphism HTML structure using the components guide above.
Use Lucide-react if Phosphor fails, but use sharp/bold variants.
